title: Spot It!
description: Easily see Ancient Debris with this resource pack!  And get your next set of Netherite faster!
body:
Ever had trouble seeing where Ancient Debris are?  Not anymore!  With this colorful pack you'll be able to see Ancient Debris from a mile away(well more like chunks),  Ancient Debris will now flash a colorful rainbow of colors so you can't miss it!

**Enjoy your new set of Netherite!**
